title: Seared Duck Breast au Jus
description: Crispy-skinned duck breast rested over a glossy red wine reduction, finished with thyme and fresh cracked pepper.

title: Truffle Risotto Bianco
description: Slow-stirred Arborio with shaved black truffle, aged Parmigiano, and a splash of dry Vermouth.

title: Miso-Glazed Black Cod
description: Silky black cod marinated 48 hours in white miso and mirin, broiled to a caramelized lacquer finish.

title: Charred Leek Soup
description: Fire-kissed leeks blended smooth with crème fraîche, served with a drizzle of chive oil and crispy shallots.

title: Lamb Rack Provençal
description: French-trimmed lamb rack crusted in herbed breadcrumbs and Dijon, roasted to a perfect blush pink.

title: Valrhona Chocolate Tart
description: A pâte sucrée shell filled with 70% dark ganache, topped with Maldon sea salt and edible gold leaf.

title: Burrata & Heirloom Tomato
description: Hand-pulled burrata over heirloom tomatoes, dressed with aged balsamic, torn basil, and a whisper of fleur de sel.

title: Short Rib Braise
description: 72-hour braised bone-in short rib in red wine and aromatics — fork-tender, impossibly rich, deeply satisfying.

title: Yuzu Posset
description: A barely-set citrus cream with yuzu zest and candied kumquat — bright, clean, and deceptively simple.
